data.name: ProjectXmlDocumentEmpty296
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <project name="Untitled" themePath="default" format="1.4"> <documents> <document name="Document 1"> <xmlData> <paragraph indent="0" align="left"><tabPositions><tabStop position="720"/></tabPositions></paragraph> </xmlData> </document> </documents> </project>

data.name: ProjectXmlDocumentWithFibField296
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <project name="Untitled" themePath="default" format="1.4"> <forms> <form name="Form 1" startPoint="true" themePath="default"> <items> <fib label="Q1"><paragraph indent="0" align="left"><tabPositions><tabStop position="144"/></tabPositions><font face="Arial" size="200" color="000000">[Replace this with your question. Underscores create blanks.] </font><blank label="a" length="10" required="false"/></paragraph></fib> </items> </form> </forms> <documents> <document name="Document 1"> <xmlData> <paragraph indent="0" align="left"><tabPositions><tabStop position="144"/></tabPositions><font face="Arial" size="200" color="000000"><field name="Form 1:Q1:a"/></font></paragraph> </xmlData> </document> </documents> </project>

data.name: ProjectXmlDocumentWithVariableField296
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <project name="Untitled" themePath="default" format="1.4"> <processes> <process name="Process 1"> <set field="MyVariable" arithmeticAsText="false"> <string value="1"/> </set> </process> </processes> <documents> <document name="Document 1"> <xmlData> <paragraph indent="0" align="left"><tabPositions><tabStop position="720"/></tabPositions><font face="Arial" size="200" color="000000"><field name="MyVariable"/></font></paragraph> </xmlData> </document> </documents> </project>

data.name: RtfWithFibField296
RtfWithTable296
